entries.description: First impeachment: Abuse of power for withholding congressionally approved military aid to Ukraine while pressuring its president to investigate a political rival
entries.causation_evidence: House Intelligence Committee report and Senate impeachment trial records

entries.description: Second impeachment: Incitement of insurrection tied to January 6 Capitol attack after rally speech and attempts to overturn 2020 election results
entries.causation_evidence: House January 6 Select Committee final report and impeachment articles

entries.description: COVID-19 response: Repeated downplaying of the virus severity, interference with CDC/FDA messaging, and promotion of unproven treatments causing delayed national coordination
entries.causation_evidence: House Select Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Crisis final report (2024)

entries.description: Zero Tolerance family separation policy at southern border: thousands of migrant children forcibly separated from parents
entries.causation_evidence: DHS Inspector General report and Ms. L v. ICE court filings

entries.description: Mueller Report: Extensive campaign contacts with Russian actors and at least 10 documented instances of obstruction of justice
Muslim travel ban executive orders: multiple versions ruled discriminatory and revised by courts
entries.causation_evidence: Supreme Court ruling in Trump v. Hawaii and lower court decisions

entries.description: Classified documents case: Retention of hundreds of classified records at Mar-a-Lago after leaving office, obstruction of recovery efforts
entries.causation_evidence: Department of Justice indictment and Special Counsel Jack Smith filings

entries.description: Election denial and fake electors scheme: Pressure on officials to overturn certified results and creation of alternate elector slates in multiple states
entries.causation_evidence: Georgia, Arizona, Michigan indictments and House January 6 Committee evidence

entries.description: Emoluments clause violations: Foreign governments and entities patronizing Trump hotels and properties while he held office
entries.causation_evidence: CREW lawsuits and House Oversight Committee reports

entries.description: Attempted pressure on Georgia Secretary of State to 'find' votes: recorded call demanding reversal of election certification
entries.causation_evidence: Fulton County grand jury indictment and recorded call transcript

entries.description: Systematic attacks on press as 'enemy of the people' and attempts to revoke security clearances of critics
entries.causation_evidence: Multiple White House statements and documented threats

entries.description: Pressure campaign on DOJ and Vice President to overturn election results, including false claims of widespread fraud
entries.causation_evidence: House January 6 Committee evidence and Senate testimony

entries.description: Charlottesville response: Equating white supremacists and counter-protesters with 'very fine people on both sides'
entries.causation_evidence: Official White House transcript and subsequent clarifications

entries.description: Attempts to delay or undermine mail-in voting during pandemic, including attacks on USPS
entries.causation_evidence: House Oversight Committee reports and court records

entries.description: Shutdown over border wall funding: longest government shutdown in history (35 days) causing widespread economic harm
Operation Warp Speed: Accelerated COVID-19 vaccine development and distribution leading to multiple vaccines authorized in record time
entries.causation_evidence: Official HHS and White House announcements

entries.description: Abraham Accords: Brokered normalization agreements between Israel and multiple Arab nations (UAE, Bahrain, Sudan, Morocco)
